introSection: Scooby-Doo Spooky Coaster is a steel enclosed wild mouse roller coaster at Warner Bros. Movie World in Australia. It was built by Mack Rides.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The attraction opened in 2002 as a replacement for the Gremlins Invasion.

The ride closed in January 2023 for a refurbishment and reopened in December 2025.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The attraction is a customised wild mouse with a dark ride section.

fullText:
Scooby-Doo Spooky Coaster is a steel enclosed wild mouse roller coaster at Warner Bros. Movie World in Australia. It was built by Mack Rides.

The attraction opened in 2002 as a replacement for the Gremlins Invasion.

The ride closed in January 2023 for a refurbishment and reopened in December 2025.

The attraction is a customised wild mouse with a dark ride section.
